description: Vertical Department of Labor news-card graphic in blue tones. The dominant image is a close-up photograph of a computer microchip mounted on a circuit board, with the chip's surface rendered as an American flag with stars and stripes. Lower on the card a small blue tab labeled 'Labor News', with three small vertical bars beside it, sits above a bold white serif headline: 'US Department of Labor launches website to build artifical [sic] intelligence skills, expand AI-focused Registered Apprenticeship programs'. A faint embossed DOL circular seal is watermarked at right, and the wordmark 'DOL.GOV' appears in the lower-right corner.
notable_text: Labor News; US Department of Labor launches website to build artifical intelligence skills, expand AI-focused Registered Apprenticeship programs; DOL.GOV
